message:
chore(release): Bump version to 0.2.0

Release highlights:
- feat(cass): SSH-based remote cass search support
- fix(config): Block repo config override of crossAgent and remoteCass
- fix: Correct merge delta ID propagation
- feat(cli): Complete agent-friendliness improvements
- Multiple bug fixes and code quality improvements

See release notes for full changelog.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
